text:
Is a €1.2 billion squad value just a giant scam? 

Spain has 22 times the market value of Cape Verde, but my model just watched them choke to a 0-0 draw. Money doesn't kick the ball.

#WorldCup2026 #Spain #CapeVerde

Does squad value actually score goals? 

Belgium is worth €548M. Egypt is worth €116M. Yet my World Cup simulation just ran and the Pharaohs walked away with a 1-1 draw. 

Money doesn't buy points when the whistle blows.

#WorldCup2026 #Egypt #Belgium

Why do we still pretend squad value wins World Cups? 

Uruguay’s €359M roster just got choked out by a €41M Saudi Arabia squad. My simulator doesn't care about your market value. Heart over bank accounts.

#WorldCup2026 #Uruguay #SaudiArabia

Spain are my model's top pick at 31%, but they just dropped points. Can they really win this? 

Under pressure, the cracks always show.

#WorldCup2026 #Spain #football

20,000 World Cups. That is what my model runs after every single final whistle. 

Not a static prediction, but a living, breathing simulation adjusting to real-time form. This isn't hype, it is just relentless math.

#WorldCup2026 #DataScience #Football

Is €1.2 billion in squad value worth anything if you can't break down a €54 million defense? 

Spain just got completely suffocated by Cape Verde. Money doesn't kick the ball. My simulator saw this grit coming. 

#WorldCup2026 #Spain #CapeVerde

Why do we still pretend squad value wins World Cups? 

Egypt just held Belgium to a 1-1 draw. That is a €116M squad stopping €548M in its tracks. My model does not care about your price tags. Heart always beats spreadsheets.

#WorldCup2026 #Belgium #Egypt
